title: Diotrephes #1361
definition:
Diotrephes = "nourished by Jove"

 1) a proud arrogant Christian mentioned in 3 Jo. 9
nasbUsage:
Definition: Diotrephes = "nourished by Jove"

 1) a proud arrogant Christian mentioned in 3 Jo. 9

    NASB:  cherished by Zeus, Diotrephes, an opponent of the apostle John:
